recap: Widened lint-staged JS glob from scripts/bin/**/*.js to **/*.js, preserving both commands.
Added is-js autoload function at term/js/is-js; exits 0 for .js extension or node shebang, exits 1 for all other cases including symlinks.

Added JS branch to git-file-lint: accumulates .js files with is-js, runs yarn run lint:fix --js with 2>&1 capture, displays errors under ── JS ── header inline (displayLintErrors not used due to JSON/stderr mismatch).
Added JS branch to git-file-test: accumulates .js paths with is-js && pattern in loop, then runs yarn run test --fail-fast --related inside if/then/fi so test failures propagate through err_return.
